title: Mass of the Ages: A Perfect Storm
original_title: Mass of the Ages: A Perfect Storm
overview: This is the story of how the New Mass (Novus Ordo) was created after Vatican II. Join us for a startling investigation into the machinations of Annibale Bugnini, and meet those who fought to preserve the Tridentine Mass against all odds.  What happened between the Second Vatican Council and the publication of the New Mass? Was it a reform that everyone in the Vatican approved of?  Peek behind the curtain and listen to the debates of bishops, cardinals, and Pope Paul VI as they pursue the most extensive liturgical reform in Church history.
